title: Propionic Acid Preparation
author: Rita M. Graze
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qjjdukn

steps.title: Dissolve 96
steps.instruction: Dissolve 96.06g of Propionic Acid, Sodium salt in 500 mL distilled water to make 2M Propionic Acid, Sodium Salt solution. undetermined, Propionic Acid, Sodium Salt undetermined, Distilled water

steps.title: Add 500 mL 2M HCl to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 mL 2M HCl to 2M Sodium Propionate solution to make 1L 1M Propionic Acid. To make 2M HCl (1L): 172 mL HCl to 828 mL deionized H 2 O. To make 2M HCl (0.5L): 86 mL HCl to 414 mL deionized H 2 O. Note : If you are making a different concentration of Propionic Acid, it is important that the concentration of HCl is equal to the concentration of the dissolved Propionic, Sodium Salt in water. undetermined, 2M HCl

steps.title: Test pH of Propionic Acid
steps.instruction: Test pH of Propionic Acid. The pH should be between ph 4.6-4.7. If the pH is above 4.7, titrate the solution with HCl to bring the pH down to specification.

steps.title: The newly made 1M Propionic Acid...
steps.instruction: The newly made 1M Propionic Acid may be diluted to the desired concentration and added to fly food according to the recipe.
